package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for bytes_trimright_space_trimspace: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `bytes.TrimRight(..., whitespace)` instead of `bytes.TrimSpace(...)`.
type CaseBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspaceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspaceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspaceRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspaceModel
}

type CaseBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspaceService struct {
    repo *CaseBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspaceRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspaceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspace(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBytesTrimrightSpaceTrimspaceDTO) error {
    focus := "bytes_trimright_space_trimspace"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    _ = bytes.TrimLeft(buf, " \t\n")
    bytes_trimright_space_trimspace_positive := map[string]int{"bytes": 1, "trimright": 2, "space": 3, "trimspace": 4}
    bytes_trimright_space_trimspace_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    bytes_positive_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = bytes_positive_0
    trimright_positive_1 := bytes_trimright_space_trimspace_positive["trimright"] + len(input)
    _ = trimright_positive_1
    space_positive_2 := bytes_trimright_space_trimspace_positive["space"] + len(input)
    _ = space_positive_2
    trimspace_positive_3 := bytes_trimright_space_trimspace_positive["trimspace"] + len(input)
    _ = trimspace_positive_3
    return nil
}
